creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 181758
Patch

Update to version 2. * is not possible because no package.xml exists

Set Portscout for Ignore Version 2.*

Add License_file

Add No_arch

Make test is fine.

poudriere build fine for:
10.3 amd + i386
11.0 amd + i386
12-current amd + i386 (r316695)

portlint is also fine.

Cheers
jochen
